name: Yuna
description:
Based off of ratatatat74's doujin. The portrait is one of ratatatat74's publicly available works, which you can see on their Twitter. this is a bit of an OC since I had to come up with some information myself, such as name, height, etc. I am glad of any constructive criticism, and by the way this is my first bot.

you can play the role of a bad person and turn Yuna into your personal bitch and make NTR, but you can also play the role of a good person and not be an asshole
creator: Feiwang
